title: Strike Cost Calculator
subtitle: How much does each strike day cost versus what the union is asking for?

strikeLoss.title: Strike Loss Counter
strikeLoss.tdEstimate: Three days ≈ {{amount}}, consistent with TD's ~$300M estimate
strikeLoss.analystBand: Analyst band: C$50–60M/day revenue impact, ~C$75M/day EBITDA basis

perFAEquivalents.title: Per-FA Strike Equivalents
perFAEquivalents.subtitle: Strike losses spread across {{count}} flight attendants
perFAEquivalents.description: Strike losses equal {{amount1year}} per FA per year over 1 year, {{amount4years}} per FA per year over 4 years, and {{amount10years}} per FA per year over 10 years

unionAsk.title: Union Ask vs Strike
unionAsk.subtitle: Unpaid work is boarding, checks, delays; currently uncompensated
unionAsk.unionAskAmount: Union ask per FA per year: {{amount}}

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
executiveSummary.comparison: At {{strikeCost}} per day for {{days}} day(s) = {{perFAAmount}} per FA per year over 4 years, which is {{comparison}} as paying {{unpaidPercent}} of unpaid hours at {{rate}}

narrative.oneDayFunding: One day of strike at {{strikeCost}} could fund {{years}} years of paying all unpaid hours at today's base rate

sources.title: Assumptions & Sources
sources.disclaimer: Financial estimates based on publicly available data and industry analysis

tooltips.strikeCost: Analysts estimate C$50–60M/day revenue loss, some cite ~C$75M/day EBITDA basis
tooltips.strikeDays: Quick presets match common talking points. '3 days' aligns with recent coverage
tooltips.unpaidPercent: How much of the 35 hours/month of ground duties get paid? Air Canada signaled 50%; union wants 100%
tooltips.parityLock: Targets the Air Transat benchmark as the top rate. Sets higher hourly before calculating unpaid time value
